title: cheilanthes subdimorpha
intro: Cheilanthes subdimorpha, also known as the brittle fern or slender cliff brake, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cheilanthes subdimorpha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Cheilanthes subdimorpha can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used in a tincture or capsule form, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
